name: Gravemist Taper
description:
Activate Cast a Spell

A gravemist taper is a conical candle with symbols of terror and death carved into the wax. The taper can be used as a catalyst when casting an spell, burning the taper away, coloring the mist gray, and filling the mist with ghastly, shadowy shapes. The flat check to overcome the state from the mist rises to 7, and a creature who fails such a check becomes Frightened 1. This aspect of the spell has the emotion, fear, and mental traits.
